title: MEMORANDUM OF SETTLEMENT SIGNED BETWEEN THE GOVERNMENT OF MIZORAM AND HPC-D(LF)
content:
21/2026-2027

Dated Sakawrdai, the 14th April, 2026 :Today at 1:00 pm, a Memorandum of Settlement was signed between the Government of Mizoram(GoM) and the Hmar People’s Convention-Democratic(Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s faction) (HPC-D (LF)) at Vengpui Community Hall, Sakawrdai. Pu David Lalthantluanga(IAS), Secretary, Home Department signed the agreement on behalf of GoM and Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate, President, HPC-D(LF) signed on behalf of the organisation. Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA and Adviser to the Chief Minister of Mizoram (Political), and Pu Rodingliana Chawngthu, IPS, DIG (Northern Range), were also present on this occasion.

Speaking on the occasion, Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA and Adviser to CM highlighted that unrest often arises when people's expectation of development is not adequately achieved. He expressed hope that today’s agreement will bring meaningful development and its success will be conspicuous. He further stated that agreements with HPC and HPC-D were signed in Aizawl before but with only a few people aware of them. However, he expressed happiness that this time the agreement was signed at Sakawrdai in the presence and full knowledge of the public, and he is very pleased to note that factional divisions among the Hmar community in Mizoram no longer exists.

Home Secretary Pu David Lalthantluanga, speaking on behalf of GoM, expressed happiness over the new milestone achieved in the path of peace and stability in Mizoram. He stated that HPC was formed in 1986 and a peace agreement was signed with them in 1994. Further, in 2018, an agreement was signed with HPC (D)-a faction that broke away from HPC and today, another agreement has been signed with another breakaway group-HPC-D (LF). He expressed relief that there are no longer any armed insurgent groups remaining in Mizoram.

The Home Secretary also stated that a peace camp will be set up near Mauchar village for the cadres of HPC-D (LF) and a “laying of arms” ceremony will be held on April 30, 2026. He expressed deep appreciation to Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate and his group as they have come forward to renounce violence and adopt a peaceful way of life.He further said that the Government of India is making efforts to transform the country into a developed nation by 2047, and at the same time, the Government of Mizoram is also striving with full commitment under the vision “Transform Mizoram 2047.” He emphasized that Mizoram aims to progress in a balanced and inclusive manner across all sectors with a clear long-term vision. To achieve this, he stressed that it is not only the responsibility of the government, but requires collective effort, unity, and cooperation among all citizens.

HPC-D (LF) President Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate stated that they had struggled for 33 years and had to make many sacrifices in order to reach this agreement. He expressed his gratitude to Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga, Adviser to CM(Political) Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte and officials of the Home Department, and expressed confidence that GoM will give due importance to the development of the Hmar-inhabited areas as they have come forward to follow a normal and peaceful way of life. He also assured that their side will also make every possible effort for the successful implementation of the agreement.

The Government of Mizoram had identified HPC-D (LF) as the only remaining underground armed group operating within Mizoram and began engaging with them since mid-2024. On September 20, 2024, the first round of peace talks was held at Mizoram House in Silchar which ended on a positive note. The second round of talks took place on October 10, 2025 at the office chamber of Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama wherein HPC-D (LF) presented their charter of demands and they were discussed constructively.

Following this, a high-level committee led by the Home Minister met on October 28, 2025 to review the progress of the talks, discuss the demands put forward by HPC-D (LF), and clarify the position of GoM.

The third round of talks was held on December 1, 2025 at Aijal Club where the Government’s views were communicated to HPC-D (LF). On December 2, 2025, HPC-D (LF) conveyed their acceptance of the Government’s position and submitted some of their demands in writing to the Home Department. Thereafter, official-level discussions continued.

The final round of talks was held on March 30, 2026 at the office of Adviser to CM(Political) Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, where all remaining issues were discussed in detail. Subsequently, on April 9, 2026, after thorough deliberations by officials led by the Home Minister, a draft agreement was prepared. As a result, the Memorandum of Settlement has been successfully signed today.

The Memorandum of Settlement signing ceremony was chaired by Pu PC Lalduhthlanga, Joint Secretary, Home Department, Government of Mizoram and Rev. Langhmingthang Joute, Presbytery Superintendent, EFCI, Sakawrdai led the invocation. Further, Pu Stephen Lalrinawma, Sr. Superintendent of Police, CID (SB), presented a report and speeches were delivered by Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA and Adviser to CM(Political); Pu David Lalthantluanga, IAS, Secretary, Home Department and Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate, President of the Hmar People’s Convention–Democratic (Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s Faction). The programme concluded with a vote of thanks by Pu Gilbert Lalhlimpuia, SDO (Civil), Sakawrdai.

The ceremony was attended by Dr. Chaltonlien Amo, former MLA of Manipur and members of the Sinlung Hills Council, members of the Village Council Sakawrdai, leaders of the YMA Tuisual Group, Joint YMA Sakawrdai leaders, leaders of Hmar Inpui (Mizoram Region), leaders of the Hmar Students' Association, and officials of the Government of Mizoram.

As per the prior arrangement, a Laying of Arms Ceremony (Surrender of arms) for 43 members of the Hmar People’s Convention–Democratic (Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s Faction) will be organised by the Government of Mizoram on April 30, 2026 (Thursday) at CTI, Sesawng.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Governor Releases Former Chief Minister Pu Zoramthanga’s Memoir “From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister”
content:
20/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 14th April, 2026 :Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), today formally released the memoir of former Chief Minister Pu Zoramthanga titled "From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister", at the Aijal Club in Aizawl.

Speaking at the launch event, the Governor described the book as far more than a mere personal narrative. He lauded it as a significant and reliable historical document that provides valuable insights into important phases of Mizoram’s political history. “The book chronicles the author’s remarkable journey from insurgency to responsible democratic governance and statesmanship,” he said. The Governor noted that the memoir serves as a powerful reminder that dialogue, understanding, and perseverance can overcome even the most difficult challenges. He praised Pu Zoramthanga’s dedication and lifelong desire to learn, saying these qualities reflect exceptional political acumen and true statesmanship. “It shows that if there is a will, there is a way,” he remarked.

General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh highlighted that Mizoram’s history is unique - a journey from struggle and conflict, through reconciliation, to lasting peace and progress. He commended the author for documenting history based on his own lived experiences and expressed hope that the memoir would help the younger generation better understand the complexities of conflict while appreciating the true value of peace and the strength of democratic institutions. The Governor believes the book will prove to be a valuable resource for students, scholars, policymakers, and citizens alike.

Author and former Chief Minister Pu Zoramthanga described the release of the book as a deeply significant milestone in his life. He revealed that he had meticulously maintained personal diaries for 50 years, which served as key references while writing the memoir. He emphasised that most of the events described in the book were personally witnessed or experienced by him. Pu Zoramthanga expressed sincere gratitude to all those who assisted in the preparation and publication of the book. He hoped that the memoir would not only benefit the Mizo people but also enable readers from other communities to gain a clearer and deeper understanding of Mizo history.

Former Chief Minister also shared a memorable personal anecdote, recalling that he had first met the Governor decades earlier during the 1971 East Pakistan War, when General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh was serving as a young Lieutenant in the Indian Army. Pu Zoramthanga remarked that it was a remarkable and unexpected coincidence that the same officer is now releasing his book as the Governor of Mizoram.

During the event, Dr Lalnunkimi Colney delivered an insightful book preview.

The memoir From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister is published by Penguin Random House. Spanning 430 pages and priced at Rs 400, the book is now available for purchase at bookstores and can also be ordered online via Amazon.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in Chief Minister hlui Pu Zoramthanga lehkhabu ziah "From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister" a tlangzarh
content:
151/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 14th April, 2026 :Mizoram Chief Minister hlui Pu Zoramthanga'n ama chanchin a ziahna lehkhabu, "From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister" tih chu vawiin khan Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan Aijal Club-ah a tlangzarh.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan "From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister" tih lehkhabu chu mimal chanchin ziahna mai ni lo, Mizoram history leh politics hriat chian nana tangkai tak, a ziaktu ngei tawnhriat atanga buatsaih, Mizoram hun tawn pawimawh tak chungchang tarlanna a ni, a ti a. Lehkhabu chu rambuai lai atanga mipui sawrkar hnuaia mawhphurhna leh hruaitu dinhmun pawimawh tak thlen dan chanchin tarlanna anih tih sawiin, he lehkhabu hian inbiakna, inhriatthiamna leh tumruhna hmangin harsatnate a chin fel theih tih a lantir a ni, a ti a. A ziaktu Pu Zoramthanga taimakna fakawm a tih thu sawiin, inzir mi anihna chuan hlawhtlinna tam tak a pek thu leh, tum chuan kawng a awm tih ataka a entir thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan Mizoramin chanchin danglam bik a neih thu sawiin, Pu Zoramthanga lehkhabu ziah chuan Mizorama thil thleng inlumlet dan fiah taka a thailan thu leh, a ziaktuin ama tawnhriat ngeite hmanga thil thlen dante a lo chhinchhiah thlap mai chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, "Hei hian thangtharte hnenah rambuai awmzia bakah zalenna leh mipui rorelna hlut zia a hriat thiam tir thei dawn a ni, a ti a. Thalai, zirlai, zirbing mi, dan siamtute leh mipuite'n tangkai taka an hman ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Lehkhabu ziaktu Chief Minister hlui Pu Zoramthanga chuan "From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister" lehkhabu tlangzarh a ni ta chu a tan thil chhinchhiah tlak tak anih thu a sawi a. Lehkhabu a khawr pum dan chanchin tarlangin, kum 50 lai diary tha taka a vawn that chu thu lak nana a hman thu leh lehkhabu chhunga thil thleng a tarlante chu amah ngei a tel vena deuh vek a nih thu a sawi a. Lehkhabu khawr pum anih theih nana buaipuitu zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu sawiin, Mizote mai bakah hnam dangte pawhin Mizo chanchin an hriat chian lehzual nana tangkai taka hman anih ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Pu Zoramthanga chuan Larsap nena an intawn dan inperhsan tak pawh he hunah hian sawi chhuakin, inhre miah lova December ni 16, 1971 East Pakistan War laia lo inep tawh, khatih laia Indian Army-a Lieutenant, tuna Mizoram Larsap ni ta General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) in India laka zalenna suala lo rammu tawh buatsaih lehkhabu a tlangzarh ta mai chu thil thleng zen zen lo leh mak dangdai tak anih thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Dr. Lalnunkimi Colney-in lehkhabu thlir lawkna ngaihnawm takin a nei a ni.

From Guerrilla Fighter to Chief Minister tih lehkhabu hi Penguin Random House chhuah a ni a. Online-in Amazon-ah a lei theih bakah, tlangzarh anih hnu hian lehkhabu zawrhna dawr hrang hrangah lei theiha chhawpchhuah a ni a. Phek 430 a chhah niin, Bu khat hi Rs 400/- man zel a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram sawrkar leh HPC-D (LF) ten inremna thuthlung ziak
content:
150/2026-2027

Sakawrdai, 14th April, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 khan Mizoram Sorkar leh Hmar People’s Convention-Democratic (Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s Faction) te chuan Vengpui Community Hall, Sakawrdai-ah Memorandum of Settlement an ziakfel a. Memorandum of Settlement-ah hian Mizoram Sorkar aiawhin Pu David Lalthantluanga, IAS, Secretary, Home Department, Government of Mizoram, chuan hming a ziak a. Hmar People’s Convention-Democratic (Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s Faction) aiawhin an President Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate-in hming a ziak bawk a ni. Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA, Adviser to Chief Minister, Mizoram (Political) leh Pu Rodingliana Chawngthu, IPS, DIG (Northern Range) ten Memorandum of Settlement ziahna hun an hmanpui a ni.

Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA, Adviser to CM ni bawk chuan he hunah hian thuchah sawiin, hmasawnna kan hmuh tur anga kan ngaih kan hmuh tawk loh vanga helna lo chhuak a ni thin a, vawiina inremna hian hmasawnna hnathawh a keng tel tih sawiin a hlawhtlinna tluan tling kan hmuh ngei ka beisei a ni a ti a. HPC leh HPC-D te nen inremna ziah a nih khan Aizawl khawpuiah mi tlemte hriatpuiin kan ziak a, tun tumah Sakawrdaiah mipui hriatpui leh hmuhpuiin inremna kan ziak hi a lawmawm a, hnam bil helpawl Mizoramah an awm tawh lo niin kan hria hi ka lawm takzet a ni a ti.

Mizoram sawrkar aiawha thusawitu Home Secretary Pu David Lalthantluanga chuan Mizoramin remna leh muanna kawnga rahbi thar kan kai hi a lawmawmin a hlu takzet a ni a ti a. HPC hi kum 1986 ah a piang a, 1994 ah remna thuthlung ziahpui an ni a, 2018 ah HPC atanga peng chhuak HPC (D) te nen inremna thuthlung ziah a ni leh a, vawiin niah peng dang leh HPC-D (LF) te nen inremna ziah a ni leh a ni a ti a, Mizorama ralthuam keng hel pawl an awm tawh lo chu a thlamuanthlak hle a ni a ti.

Home Secretary chuan Mauchar khaw daiah HPC-D (LF) te awm lailawkna tur peace camp siam a nih thu sawiin, April ni 30, 2026 ah silai tun (laying of arms) inkhawm neih a nih tur thu a sawi a, Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate leh a pawl ten silai chelek tawh lova nunphung pangngai zawm tura an rawn chhuak chu a lawmawm takzet a ni a ti a, 2047 ral hma a India ram hi ram changkang (developed country) a hlankai tumin sawrkar laipuiin hma a la a, hetih rual hian Mizoram sawrkar pawhin "Transform Mizoram 2047" thupuia neiin theihtawp a chhuah ve mek a, Mizoram kil tin hi rualkhai taka hma kan sawn a, kan changkan rual theihna turin hmathlir thui tak a nei tih a sawi a, hemi tihlawhtling tur chuan sawrkar chauh ni lovin, mipui zawng zawngte nen pheikhai rual tak leh inringtawn tak chunga kan kal a ngai a ni a ti a, remna tluantling a awm theihnan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Thusawitu dang HPC-D (LF) President, Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate pawhin kum 33 chhung an ralmu tih sawiin, inremna thleng tur hian thil tam tak an chân a ni a ti a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Home Ministet Pu K. Sapdanga, Adviser to CM (Political) Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte bakah Home Department officialte chungah lawmthu a sawi a, an duhthusam ang tak inremna chu a ni lo chungin lungawi tawn theihna tur thil a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Hmar tlangdung hmasawnna tur Mizoram sawrkarin a ngaihsak dawn a ni tih rinna nen nunphung pangngai zawm turin an rawn chhuak a ni a ti a. Anni lam pawhin inremna thuthlung tihlawhtling turin theihtawp an chhuah dawn tih a sawi bawk a ni.

Mizoram sawrkar chuan Mizoram chhunga ralthuam keng chi bil hel pawl la awm chhun nia hriat HPC-D (LF) te hi 2024 kum laihawl atangin a dawr tan a, September ni 20, 2024 khan Silchar Mizoram House ah inbiakna hmasa ber (first round of peace talk) neih a ni a, boruak tha tak hnuaiah inthlahliam a ni. October ni 10, 2025 ah Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama pisaah inbiak vawi 2-na neih a ni a, hetah hian an thil phut (charter of demand) an rawn pharh a, tha takin sawiho a ni.

Hemi hnu hian Home Minister kaihhruai Committee lian din a ni a, October ni 28, 2025 khan thutkhawm a ni a, inbiakna neih tawh dan thlirho niin HPC-D (LF) te demand sawiho a nih bakah Mizoram sawrkar duhdan te sawifel a ni.

December ni 1, 2025 khan Aijal Club-ah inbiak vawi 3-na neih leh a ni a, Mizoram sorkar duhdan te hrilhhriat an ni a, December ni 2, 2025 ah HPC-D (LF) te hian Mizoram sorkar duhdan an pawm thu leh anmahni lam thil phut thenkhat ziakin Home Department ah an thlen a, official level ah indawr chhunzawm zel niin, March ni 30, 2026 ah Adviser to CM (Political) Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte pisaah inbiakna hnuhnung ber neih a ni a, engkim a tul tur ang ang sawiho niin April ni 9, 2026 khan Home Minister hova official pawimawh kalkhawmten uluk takin an thirho hnuah ruahmanna siam a ni a, vawiinah inremna ziahfel a ni thei ta a ni.

Memorandum of Settlement ziahna hun hi Pu PC Lalduhthlanga, Joint Secretary, Home Department, Government of Mizoramin a kaihruai a. Rev. Langhmingthang Joute, Presbytery Superintendent, EFCI, Sakawrdaiin hunserh a hmang a. Pu Stephen Lalrinawma, Sr. Superintendent of Police, CID (SB) chuan report pein, Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA, Adviser to Chief Minister, Mizoram (Political), Pu David Lalthantluanga, IAS, Secretary, Home Department leh Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate, President, Hmar People’s Convention- Democratic (Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s Faction)te chuan thu an sawi bawk a ni. Pu Gilbert Lalhlimpuia, SDO (Civil), Sakawrdaiin lawmthu sawiin Memorandum of Settlement ziahna hun hi a khar a ni.

Memorandum of Settlement ziahna hun hi Dr. Chaltonlien Amo, ex-MLA, Manipur, Sinlung Hills Council Member-te, Village Council Sakawrdai member-te, YMA Tuisual Group hruaitute, Joint YMA Sakawrdai hruaitute, Hmar Inpui (Mizoram Region) hruaitute, Hmar Students' Association hruaitute bakah Mizoram Sorkar Official te’n an hmanpui a ni.

Ruahman lawk dan chuan Hmar People’s Convention-Democratic (Lalhmingthanga Sanate’s Faction) mi leh sa 43 (sawmli leh pathum) te tan Mizoram Sorkar chuan April ni 30, 2026 (Ningani) hian CTI, Sesawng-ah Laying of Arms Ceremony (silai tun inkhawm) a buatsaih dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: EARLY CHILDHOOD ASSESSMENT CAMP BUATSAIH
content:
149/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 14th April 2026 :Vawiin khan Women & Child Development leh Health & Family Welfare buatsaihin Poshan Pakhwada (Nutrition Fortnight) hman mek denchhenin Early Childhood Assessment Camp, Millenium Centre Exhibition Hall-ah buatsaih a ni.

He programme-ah hian a thlawna inentirna, infiamna leh lehkha chhiarna hmun a awm a, naupang a duh apiang tan a Pediatrician Corner, Psychiatrist Corner, Clinical Psychologist Corner, Psychiatric Social Work Corner, Occupational Therapy Corner, Special Educator Corner, Speech & Language Pathologist Corner, Reading Corner, Dental checkup corner, Anemia Test Centre leh Arts & Craft Corner-te siam a ni.

He Programme hi Pi Sailopari, Joint Director-in a kaihruai a, Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte Director-in thusawiin he programme hi a hawng a. Naupang, Nu leh pate, Sikul zirtirtute mi 500 chuang an pungkhawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial District Excise & Narcotics Department-in Heroin No 4 hawng 16 an man
content:
148/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 14th April, 2026 :Hnahthial Excise and Narcotics Department chuan tukin zing dar 05:00 vel khan Khawhri leh Thingsai inkarah Heroin No. 4 hawng 16 (grams 189) an man a. A phurtu leh neitu ni ngeia hriat, Laihrethanga kum 28 s/o Vawmkaithanga, Siahatla chu man in a phurhna lirthei, Mahindra Bolero Maxx Pickup, MZ 03A 1593 chu man tel bawk a ni. ND&PS Act hnuaiah Case siamsak niin Judicial Magistrate Court hma a in lan turin chawhnu dar khat vel khan Lunglei lamah thawn nghal a ni.

Excise and Narcotics Department, Hnahthial Officer in Charge, Pu C. Lianchungnunga chuan an thu dawn bawhzuiin nizan khan Khawhri VC leh YMA hruaitute nen an duty thu sawiin tlaivara an duty hnuah zing dar 5:00 khan an man tak thu a sawi a ni. Laihrethanga statement atanga a lan danin heroin an man sak tak hi Duha, Ralpel, Myanmar ami ta niin Hnahthial leh Lunglei lama sem darh tura tih a ni.

Tun tuma heroin an man hi tualchhung hralhna rate chuan cheng nuai sarih leh sing hnih (Rs. 7,20,000) man hu vel a chhut a ni.

title: Ram chhung hmun dangte rualin Mizoramah pawh Fire Service Week 2026 hman a ni
content:
147/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl: the 14 April 2026 :Kum tinin Fire Service Week hi India ram pumah 14th – 20th April chhungin hman thin niin, 14th April bik hi Fire Service Day/Martyrs Day atan hman a ni thin bawk a. Mizoramah chuan Tukin khan Pu H.L. Thangzuala, Director, Fire & Emergency Services Department chuan Fire Service Week, 2026 hi State puma hman turin a hawng a ni.

Kumin Fire Service Week/Hapta, hawnnaah hian Fire & Emergency Services Department Director, Pu H.L. Thangzuala chuan thu sawiin India ram puma Fire Service Week hmanin a tum bulpui ber chu mipui vantlang leh mimal tin te, kan nitin nun, khawsak leh chet velna tinrengah kangmei tichhuaklo tura invenna leh fimkhurna chang kan lo hriat deuh deuhna tura inzirtir a nih thu a sawi a. Kumin Fire Service Week thupui sawizauvin Pu H.L. Thangzuala chuan, Kangmei lakah Sikul leh Damdawi inte a lo him zawk nan khawtlang mipuite kangmei tichhuak lo tura infuihna a nih thu a tarlang a. Fire Service Day 2026 pualin Department a thawk zawng zawngte chu mahni zawn theuhah inpekna thar nen, tha leh zual a hna thawk theuh tura sawmin, mipuite rawngbawltu an ni tih inhre thar theuh turin a chah nghal bawk a ni.

Mizoramah chuan kumin Fire Service Week pual hian damdawi in thlan bikahte Fire Safety Audit neih a ni dawn a. Tin, School hrang hrangah School naupangte Fire & Evacuation Drill leh Lecture & Demonstration neih pui an ni dawn bawk a ni.

Kumin Fire Service week denchhen hian Mizoram atangin F&ES a thawk mi 5 (panga) te chu Director General-Fire Service, Civil Defence & Home Guard, MHA, Govt. of India chuan an hnathawh that avangin Silver & Bronze Disc and Commendation Certificate dawng turin a rawn thlang a, chungte chu:

Silver Disc

1. Pu Lalremmawia Divisional Fire Officer, F&ES.

Brone Disc

1. Firefighter R.Laltanliana Serchhip Fire Station

2. Firefighter H. Lalremruata Mamit Fire Station

3. Driver Grade – II Ramsangzela Mamit Fire Station

4. Driver Grade – II FX Laltanpuia Serchhip Fire Station-te an ni.

Kum 1944, April ni 14 khan Indo lawng lian tak ‘S.S Fort Stikine’ an tih chu Mumbai lawng chawlh hmun a lo thleng a. He lawng, ralthuam leh bomb lam chi tam tak phur hi a kang ta vak mai a. He kangmei chhuak rapthlak takah hian Bombay Fire Brigade mi 66 leh Bombay Salvage Corps mi 11 kangthelh tute chuan an nunna an chan phah a. Heng mitthi te hriatrengna atan hian Fire Service Day hi April 14 ah hian hman a ni ta a. Hemi ni denchhen hian April 14th - 20th chhung hi Fire Service Week atan hman a ni thin a ni. He week chhung hian India rama Fire Service chi hrang hrang te chuan hmun hrang hrangah kangmei laka himna tur zirtirna an nei thin a. Kumin 2026 Fire Service Week thupui atan hian India Sawrkar chuan "Safe School, Safe Hospital & Fire Aware Society – Together for Fire Prevention" tih a thlang a ni.

Martyrs Day/Comemmoration Day Parade hi Aizawl ah chuan Fire & Emergency Services Headquarters, Hunthar Vengah ni 14th April 2026 zing dar 7:00 a.m. khan hman a ni a. Aizawl pawn lama Fire Station te chuan ni 14th April 2026 zing dar 9:00 a.m ah an mahni hmun theuh ah an hmang ve bawk a ni.

Kumin Martarte sunna hunah hian kum 2025 chhunga kangthelhna leh duty kaihhnawih a thi te hming chhiar chhuakin anmahni sun nan Minute khat ngawi renga dingin an pual hian Martar thlanah Pangpar dah a ni a. Chungte chu :-

S/No              Name                        Designation                                   Name of State/Deptt.

1.           Pu Sony S Kumar        Fire & Rescue Officer                  Kerela Fire & Rescue Services.2.           Pu Dunger Singh         Leading Fireman                         Uttarakhand Fire & Emergency Services

-te an ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial District Urban Development Officer kaihruaina hnuaiah ni hnih awh tur - Cleanliness Drive kalpui tan a ni
content:
146/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 14th April, 2026 :Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation Department bultumin Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban) hnuaiah ni hnih awh tur Faina Hnatlangpui - Cleanliness Drive chu Hnahthial District Urban Development Officer, Pi Christina Lalnunfeli kaihhruaiin tukin khan kalpui tan a ni a. Ropuiliani Hall leh HDVA court chhehvel bakah District Hospital pan chhohna bawr te tih fai a ni.

Faina hnatlang hi DUDO staff leh Lungleng Veng BKHP tangkawp ten tukin khan neiin Cleanliness Drive hi naktuk lamah pawh kalpui chhunzawm tur a ruahmanna siam a ni a. Naktuk lamah chuan HDVA Volleyball Court thutna leh a chhehvel chu rawng hnawih that tura ruahmanna siam a ni.

title: SPORTS MINISTER PU LALNGHINGLOVA HMAR-IN TUICHANGRAL GAMES 2026 KHAWHAI-A NEIH TUR HAWNG
content:
145/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 13th April, 2026 :Nizan dar 7:30 khan Sports & Youth Services (SYS) Department Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Tuichangral Games & Sports Association (TGSA) buatsaih, April 13 – 22, 2026 chhunga Khawhaia neih tur, Tuichangral Games 2026 hawnna inkhawm chu Khawhai Town Hall-ah khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Hrangturzo bialtu MLA Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, Adviser to CM ni bawk chu khualzahawm niin, TGSA Sr. Vice President Pu Lalrengpuia Kawlni chuan inkhawm a kaihruai a ni.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Tuichangral Games chu GSA leh mipui tangrualin an buatsaih a nih avangin a ngaihlu hle tih a sawi a. Sports Minister dinhmun a luah tirha a tih hmasak ber pakhat chu Tuichangral leh Tuipuiral Games tihmasawn tura hmalak a ni, a ti a. Tuichangral mipuite'n Games chu lo ngaihlu sauh sauh tur leh, a bikin kum naupang zawk tana Olympic sports discipline-a inelna buatsaih thin chu ngai thutak zel turin a chah a ni.

Sports Minister chuan sawrkarin Olympic 2036 hmathlir neiin a bulthut atangin sports a kalpui tih a sawi a. "Infiamna thenkhatah India rama langsar pha khawp kan nih avangin sports-a sâng ta viau ah kan inngai maithei. National Games darthlalangah kan dinhmun dik tak pholan in a awm thin a, India rama infiamna khawmpui lianah a hnuai lamah zel kan awm thin. Chu chu thlak kan tum a, sports infrastructure leh thildang kan ngaih pawimawh rualin infiammite theihna tihhmasawn kan ngai pawimawh ber a, a bulthut atangin coaching tha pek kan duh” a ti a. Empowering Mizoram Sports (EMS) kaltlangin Mizoram sawrkarin infiammite bana kaihna tur a kalpui mek tih a sawi a, infrastructure lam buaipui țhulh loin a pawimawh zawk infiammite chher chhuah chu an tum lian ber a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan EMS chu a taka kalpui mek tawh a ni a, Mizote thiam zawng, India pawh a thatna Olympic sports discipline thlanchhuah pariat - Archery, Badminton, Boxing, Hockey, Judo, Taekwondo, Weightlifting leh Wrestling - ah te naupang kum 8 - 15 inkar tan ni 15 (darkar 45) chhung coaching kalpui a ni tih a tarlang a. Coach hi EMS website kaltlanga dil tur niin, coach diltu khua/veng te'n an kal man leh thlenna an tum ang. Hei hi khawtlang leh mipuiin neitu nihna rilru pu-a theihtawp an lo chhuah ve nan ruahman a nih thu a sawi a. Sawrkarin coach tur pawh a uluk a, JICA India nen tangkawpin December 2025 khan Nippon Sports Science University, Tokyo-a mithiam bik te'n Mizo coach-te training an pe tawh tih a sawi bawk. Tuichangral huam chhunga khuate chu EMS hnuaia coach dil theuh turin a sawm nghal a ni.

Sports Minister hmalakna-in kum 2025 atangin Tuichangral Games leh Tuipuiral Games-ahte naupang zawk tan Olympic sports discipline-ah inelna buatsaih thin a ni a. Kumin Tuichangral Games-ah pawh hian Mizoram State Sports Council (MSSC), sports association leh Tuichangral GSA-te tangrualin kum 16 hnuailam tan Boxing, Weightlifting leh Wrestling-ah inelna buatsaih leh a ni ang. Inelna buatsaihna'n sawrkar atangin sports association-ah Rs. 1,00,000/- theuh leh Tuichangral GSA ah Rs. 50,000/- pek thin a ni a. GSA a pek thin hi nakum atang chuan Rs. 1,00,000/- ah tihpun a nih tur thu leh, Tuichangral Games buatsaihtute an inhawn chhung chuan EMS sports discipline dangah pawh sawrkarin a puih zel tur thu Sports Minister chuan a puang a ni. Sports Minister chuan Tuichangral Games thlengtu Khawhai field tihhmasawnna'n cheng nuai 15 dah a nih tawh thu a puang bawk.

Khualzahawm Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte pawhin thu sawiin, Tuichangralte sports lama hma an sawn chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Infiamna hi inunauna titha zawng leh tihmasawn zawnga kalpui a nih loh chuan khua leh khua inerna leh inhuatna thlentu a ni duh khawp mai, a ti a. Infiamna hi a tha zawnga kalpui zel turin leh talent nei tha tak takte zawn chhuahna atana tangkai taka hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hunah hian Women & Child Development atangte, MBOCWW leh LESDE atangte-in thusawi ngaihthlak a ni a. Sawrkar official-te leh khawtlang mipui thahnem tak an tel a ni.

Tuichangral Games 2026 hi a ṭum 15-na a ni a. Kum 1970 khan ‘Tuipui, Tuichangral Mini Olympic’ (TTMO) tiin infiamna hi an lo kalpui tawh a, kum 3 chhung kalpui a nih hnuah sum lam harsatna avangin chawlhsan niin, kum 1982 khan mi ṭhahnemngaiten Tuichangral Games hming vuahin an din thar leh ta a ni. Kum 12 chhung zet kalpui a nih leh hnuah sum lam harsatna avang bawkin chawlhsan a lo ni leh a, kum 2005 khan Tuichangral khawchhuak mi ṭhahnemngaite zarah mi 8 sponsor-na hnuaiah neih chhoh a lo ni leh ta a. Kum 2014 khan khawchhak lam Tuipuiral nen infinin ‘Tuipui, Tuichangral Games’ tiin khawchhak lam leh khawthlang lam nen inthlen chhawkin kum 3 chhung neih a lo ni tawh bawk.

Tuichangral Games 2026 ah hian Football (mipa leh hmeichhia), Volleyball (mipa leh hmeichhia) bakah kum 16 hnuai lam tan Boxing, Wrestling leh Weightlifting-ahte inelna neih a ni dawn a. He Games-in a tum ber chu India-in kum 2036 Olympic thleng tura a inbuatsaih mekah Mizo ten infiammi, India aiawh tur kan thawh ve ngei theih nan kum sawm leh paruk (16) hnuai lamah nasa taka ṭan lak hi a ni a. Kum 2036 Opympic hmathlir nei chungin Chief Minister leh Sports Minister ruahmanna-in kum 16 hnuai lam tan Boxing, Wrestling leh Weightlifting pawh hi buatsaih a ni.

Attachment
